Clinical Overview

Integrated ECG Monitoring & Analysis

The ECG Patch Monitor integrates seamlessly with an advanced ECG Analysis Service. It supports physicians, healthcare providers, and patients by enabling more accurate diagnoses, improved treatment decisions, and continuous, seamless monitoring.

How It Works

EZYPRO® Service Process

01
Feel Symptoms
Experiencing palpitations, dizziness, or chest pain — you go seek medical care.
02
Wear EZYPRO®
Your physician prescribes EZYPRO® to wear at home for up to 14 days.
03
Analysis & Diagnosis
Return EZYPRO®. ECG data is analyzed by certified analysts. Your physician receives the detailed report.
04
Treat & Care
With the EZYPRO® report, your physician makes better diagnoses and personalizes your healthcare program.

Detailed Clinical Data

Patient compliance, skin tolerability, arrhythmia detection comparisons, and detection rates — all from peer-reviewed clinical studies.

Mean wear time: 12.3 days — more than 12× longer than a standard 24-hour Holter monitor
